ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Balances context and persona but could improve naturalness in tone to better reflect the Scholar's formal demeanor.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Maintains consistency with no context, lacks immediate relevance due to lack of urgency in the Scholar's response style but maintains persona and naturalness.
